prestazioni: Engine swap to a 3.6L VR6 (engine code: **BWS**) with forged internals (Mahle forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ARP head studs) and a custom Schrick 284° camshaft for high-RPM power retention, paired with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a **Precision 4655** wastegate for precise boost control (targeting 1.2 bar / 17.5 psi).

Full **02A 6-speed manual transmission** reinforcement with a **Quaife ATB differential**, **South Bend Stage 3+ clutch**, and a **Peloquin LSD** for optimal power delivery, mated to a **02J transmission mount insert** (polyurethane) to reduce drivetrain slop under hard launches.

Custom **Motec M150 ECU** standalone engine management with **Bosch Motorsport 1,000cc injectors**, **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor**, and a **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve** to prevent compressor surge. Supporting mods include a **GReddy intercooler kit (front-mount, 2.5" core)** and a **Forge Motorsport dual-pass oil cooler** to maintain optimal temperatures during track use.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (MK3-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and overfenders) with **custom 3M Gloss Black wrap** and **Hella Pagid GT4 brake calipers** (painted Signal Yellow) peeking through **BBS LM-R 18x9.5" wheels** (ET35, 5x100 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/18)** for aggressive stance and grip.

**OEM+ Euro-spec front bumper** (VW part #1H0807221B) with **custom LED DRLs (Lux H8 V3)** and a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (MK3-specific, vented) to reduce weight and improve airflow. Rear features a **custom ducktail spoiler (carbon fiber, 3D-printed mold)** and **OEM VW Motorsport rear diffuser** (part #1H0807509A) for aerodynamic balance.

**Full interior overhaul** with **Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth, red stitching)** bolted to a **Custom Cages 6-point roll cage (T45 steel, powder-coated gloss black)**, a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (suede, 350mm)** on a **NRG quick-release hub**, and **OMP HTE-R pedals** for precise heel-toe downshifts. Audio system replaced with a **JL Audio 10TW3 subwoofer** in a **custom sealed enclosure** (mounted in the spare tire well) paired with **Focal Utopia M components** for high-fidelity sound.
